notes: Seed library of known issues. Extend via validator failures + verified fixes.

includes: Text content does not match server-rendered HTML

items.root_cause: Client/server render mismatch due to dynamic content rendered on server.
fix_steps: Wrap the problematic component with next/dynamic and disable SSR if needed.
Ensure deterministic rendering on server by gating browser-only APIs behind useEffect.

includes: new row violates row-level security policy

items.root_cause: RLS enabled without correct SELECT/INSERT policies for authenticated role.
fix_steps: Create explicit RLS policies for the table for authenticated users.
Test with Supabase SQL editor using auth.jwt() claims.

includes: No signatures found matching the expected signature

items.root_cause: Wrong webhook secret or request body modified before verification.
fix_steps: Ensure you use the endpoint's webhook signing secret (whsec_...).
Use raw request body for verification; disable JSON parsing before verification.
